description: Karaite marriage contract (previously catalogued in PGP as betrothal document per Ktiv metadata). Dated 6 Nisan 5528 AM (1768 CE). The key clause that qualifies the document as a ketubba is in l. 7: נשאתי וקניתי וקדשתי לי לאשה. Groom: Yosef b. Moshe b. Yosef. Bride: Marḥaba bt. Yaʿacov b. Shlomo ha-Levi. The groom commits not to marry another wife for 20 years, unless his wife will become childless than he can marry another after 10 years, and not to harm her or her relatives. The marital payments are listed accordingly: 50 kesif + 350 medin + 200 medin + 1000 medin. AA/MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
